arcs.title: The Table Awaits
arcs.summary: New arc, opening quietly: the kitchen table is empty for the first time since mid-June. It has hosted a goblin-trail investigation, a transitional coffee cup, and a handful of mail. It is now clear. Something is coming — a new expedition, a new project, a new plan. Steve has not said what. The Jeep's tank, sources note, is full. Day 2 should bring the first hint of what the table is about to host: a map, a set of tools, a waymarker circled in pencil, or something Steve produces from the garage that requires a flat surface and some thought.
